channel.title: Abouts on Huaipeng's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Huaipeng's Blog

item.description:
大学时期个人资料，待更新

RESEARCH INTEREST

  • Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Deep Learning

DEDUCATION

  • †† M.S., Harbin Institute of Technology 2016～2018
  • †† B.S., Harbin Institute of Technology 2012~2016

PUBLICATION

  • Yijia Liu, Wanxiang Che, Simon, Bing Qin, and Ting Liu. 2018. Distilling Knowledge for Search-based Structured Prediction. In Proceedings of the 56th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL).
  • Yuan J, Zhao H, Zhao Y, et al. Babbling-The HIT-SCIR System for Emotional Conversation Generation[C]//National CCF Conference on Natural Language Processing and Chinese Computing. Springer, Cham, 2017: 632-641.
  • Che, W., Guo, J., Wang, Y., Zheng, B., Zhao, H., Liu, Y., … & Liu, T. (2017). The HIT-SCIR system for end-to-end parsing of universal dependencies. Proceedings of the CoNLL 2017 Shared Task: Multilingual Parsing from Raw Text to Universal Dependencies, 52-62.

PROJECTS

  • NLP&CC-2017 Shared Task - Emotional Conversation Generation (Rank 2th)
  • CoNLL-2017 Shared Task - Universal Dependencies (Rank 4th)
  • Chinese Disfluency Detection

EMPLOYMENTS

  • Algorithm Engineer, Alibaba Inc., Search Division. 2018.07~Now
  • Intern Researcher and Developer, IFLYTEC Inc., HIT·iFLYTEK Language Cognitive Computing Lab (HFL). 2016.05~2016.08

TECHNIQUE

  • Programming Languages: Python, Java, Shell, SQL
  • Experience: PyTorch, TensorFlow

AWARDS

  • The National Scholarship (2013)
  • People scholarship (2013）
